0.q: SaMMT1, which contained no insertion in this domain, readily demonstrated in vitro MMT activity... MMT... is the first step of plant DMSP synthesis.

1.q: when provided with SMM, only SaODC demonstrated SDC activity (Fig. 1c), showing a Km of 2.13 ± 0.20 mM and a Kcat of 1.67 ± 0.08 nmol µg−1 min−1 protein.

2.q: Both SaCAO1 and SaCAO2 showed DOX activity, but the latter was ~45-fold more active, with an approximate Kcat of 298.57 pmol µg−1 min−1.
